title: Algerian Strawberry Tagine
description: A sweet and tangy dessert inspired by traditional Algerian cuisine, featuring fresh strawberries and a hint of tropical spices.

ingredients.name: tropical spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cinnamon, cardamom, and ginger

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern markets

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together strawberries, tempting honey, tropical spices, algerian rose water, and tagine spice blend.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the strawberries are tender and the mixture is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional strawberries if desired.
